/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/llama-gguf-hash.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/llama-gguf-hash.dir/gguf-hash.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/xxhash.dir/deps/xxhash/xxhash.c.o CMakeFiles/sha1.dir/deps/sha1/sha1.c.o CMakeFiles/sha256.dir/deps/sha256/sha256.c.o -o ../../../../bin/llama-gguf-hash  -Wl,-rpath,/home/joan/Documents/IA/sharing/3rdparty/BitNet-1.58b/build_vulkan/3rdparty/llama.cpp/ggml/src: ../../ggml/src/libggml.so
